final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial illustration of a cherry blossom season school scene in a fresh Japanese anime-inspired style.

Style/medium: clean Japanese illustration style, soft watercolor-like rendering with gentle linework, reminiscent of Makoto Shinkai's warm school-day aesthetics
Composition: medium full-body shot, slight low angle looking up toward the school building entrance, natural 50mm-equivalent framing with shallow background softness
Subject: a young woman in a classic sailor-style school uniform (水手服), standing in front of a school building, hair gently lifted by a soft breeze, expression serene and youthful
Scene/backdrop: Japanese school campus in full cherry blossom season, pink sakura petals drifting down through the air, school building facade visible behind her
Lighting/mood: bright midday sunlight with warm golden tones, soft lens flare through the sakura canopy, cheerful and nostalgic spring atmosphere
Color palette: soft pink sakura as the dominant accent, white and navy of the sailor uniform as anchor, warm golden sunlight as overlay, pale sky blue as background base
Materials/textures: delicate petal translucency, flowing fabric folds in the uniform, fine individual hair strands catching the light
Avoid: dark or moody shadows, autumn or winter color grading, overly sharp hard edges, generic Western school setting, watermark
